search_query: how to get better at sports
retrieved_result: Bass at the Drop of a Shot "Bass at the Drop of a Shot" By Rich Zaleski It's new!Well, maybe it's not so new. Live bait fishermen have been using rigs with the hook (s) tied above the weight for eons, and that is the essence of drop shot (also known as under shot) rigging. OK, you say, but as a method for presenting soft plast
Decision_Reason: The retrieved page discusses bass fishing techniques (drop shot rigging), which is unrelated to general guidance on improving athletic performance or sports skills.
